title: neomammillaria hirsuta
intro: Neomammillaria hirsuta, also known as the hairy mammillaria, is a small, globular cactus species that belongs to the mammillaria genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Neomammillaria hirsuta include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Neomammillaria hirsuta can be made by drying and infusing the plant's stems and flowers in hot water, creating a tea that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
